comment.body: Hey all, just a reminder that today is 9/11 and for the markets that generally has meant that SPX will close higher than yesterday's close price.  I believe there have only been two 9/11 days (or the Monday after 9/11) where the market has closed lower vs the day before.  Thought this would be helpful to remember for today.

comment.body: idk what your hoping to achieve by "backtest" or if there is a translation issue or something, but if you are wondering if her scenarios are ever blatantly wrong id say no it hasn't happened,  if your wondering if some ppl lost money misunderstanding the interpretation of it, id say yea it seems like some ppl did around may.(were lots of confused and angry ppl in the chat)  but only the ppl who were looking for trading signals in the wrong place. like for example, somebody could have read todays post like "oh, she said 6510!!! wrong! i bought puts at open and sold 30 mins later cuz lie!" when thats not at all what she said. she NEVER said "buy 6510puts at open!"...
